info.name: WatchDogAI
info.description: AI-powered smart security system REST API. Set the `base_url` variable (default http://localhost:8000) and, when API_TOKEN is configured on the server, the `api_token` variable — every request sends it as the X-API-Token header.

request.description: Overall system state (active / degraded / inactive), per-camera health and latest detection results, and the total alert count.
Configured cameras with online/healthy flags and source type.
Per camera: currently visible people/vehicles and cumulative unique counts.

Paginated alert list, newest first. Optional filters: status (new/reviewed/dismissed) and camera_id. Each alert has id, timestamp, confidence, clip_path, camera_id, alert_type (violence/loitering/running/anomalous_movement), status.
Deletes the alert and its MP4 clip from disk. Returns 404 when the alert does not exist.
Endless multipart/x-mixed-replace MJPEG stream with tracked-object overlay. Best viewed in a browser tag; Postman will keep loading.
